% AUTO-GENERATED by analysis/make_label_tables.py -- do not edit by hand.
\section{Benchmark labels by simulated antigen}

Per-antigen alanine-scan labels (mutation to alanine) for the systems we simulate. Each value is the change in binding free energy \ddG\ in kcal/mol, derived from the measured affinity ($K_d$) or inhibition ($K_i$) constant via $\ddG = RT\ln(K^{\mathrm{mut}}/K^{\mathrm{wt}})$ at $T=310$\,K ($RT=0.616$\,kcal/mol). Positive \ddG\ = mutation weakens binding; one column per antibody scanned against that antigen.

\end{table}
